allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',''\)\) for l in lines if l and 'role' in json.loads\(l\) and json.loads\(l\).get\('role'\)=='user']")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\) lines = data.split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('role'\) == 'user': msg = obj.get\('message', ''\) if isinstance\(msg, list\): for item in msg: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('USER:', item.get\('text',''\)[:2000]\) elif isinstance\(msg, str\): print\('USER:', msg[:2000]\) except: pass ")
